STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN, ROBERT J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRELLI, NEAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 735 PERALTA AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
